title: Day 16 Reflection
description: Solidify Redux Toolkit patterns before RTK Query tomorrow.

prompts.question: When would you keep todo state in Context/useReducer vs Redux Toolkit?
prompts.guidance: Compare Day 12 cart with today todos.

prompts.question: Did you accidentally mutate state? How did Redux Toolkit Immer help or confuse you?
Explain pure functions and why your reducers must follow that rule.
How does your filter selector derive active and completed lists?
What would break if you introduced RTK Query today instead of waiting for Day 17?
prompts.guidance: Preview server state separation without implementing.
